title: PM Domain Migration Mapping Infrastructure
objective: Create the staging-only migration infrastructure required for a later dry-run V1-to-V2 PM migration, including mapping tables, enum conversion functions, migration audit logging, and dry-run readiness checks, without moving production data.
required_inputs: Legacy V1 source-table inventory and mapping rules
Decision on timezone conversion rule or an explicit temporary default
constrained_outputs: Migration infrastructure SQL or setup artifacts in the staging lane only
A handoff note documenting created mapping tables, enum functions, audit logging, and readiness results
No production data movement and no runtime code changes
validation_steps: Confirm all work is limited to the staging database and migration support structures
Confirm mapping artifacts cover scope-to-work-package lookup, enum conversion, and audit traceability
Confirm dry-run readiness blockers are named explicitly if V1 source access is incomplete
Confirm no production data movement or runtime adoption work occurs in this packet
sql_permission_note: Packet 009a authorizes staging-only migration support structures such as migration schema tables and conversion functions. It does not authorize production data movement.
